Hardware Component File

N_L21B_ABS-VDC_UDS_EIPF1_20170112

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference N_L21B_ABS-VDC_UDS_EIPF1_20170112.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 740
Receive ID 760
Functional Addr 01
Functional Name ABS-VDC

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "16",
    "supplier": "ABCD",
    "soft": "11111111111111111111111111111111",
    "version": "11111111111111111111111111111111"
  }
]
